questionHtml: Explain evidence from the data in the table that could be used to persuade a smoker to give up smoking.
markschemeHtml:
a. incidence of lung cancer decreases the earlier the smoker gives up smoking ✔

b. continuing smoking increases incidence of lung cancer ✔

c. after 30 years of not smoking the risk of lung cancer is low/similar to non-smokers ✔

 

Accept vice versa

meta.title: Explain evidence from the data in the table that could be used to persuade a smoker to give up smoking.
